steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for PETRORECÔNCAVO S.A. indicators
from pprint import pprint
# Given data
assets = 7454930000.0
ativo_circulante = 1573777000.0
caixa_equivalentes = 315621000.0
aplicacoes = 702215000.0
contas_receber = 355003000.0
estoques = 19734000.0
tributos_rec = 100087000.0
outros_circ = 81117000.0
# Noncurrent
ativo_realiz_long = 231754000.0
imobilizado = 5573251000.0
intangivel = 76148000.0
# Passivos
passivo_total = 7454930000.0
passivo_circ = 636063000.0
fornecedores = 367947000.0
emprestimos_fin_circ = 67824000.0
outros_obrig = 32652000.0
provisoes_circ = 171000.0
passivo_nc = 2355077000.0
emprestimos_fin_nc = 1788205000.0
outras_obrig_nc = 375425000.0
provisoes_nc = 191447000.0
patrimonio_liq = 4463790000.0
# Income statement quarter and annual
# Q1 2024 values (penultimo in first table)
rev_q1_2024 = 744735000.0
cogs_q1_2024 = -475848000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 268887000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 199490000.0
fin_q1_2024 = -70978000.0
pretax_q1_2024 = 128512000.0
tax_q1_2024 = -18479000.0
net_q1_2024 = 110033000.0
# Q1 2025 (ultimo in first table)
rev_q1_2025 = 860752000.0
cogs_q1_2025 = -540866000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 319886000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 259765000.0
fin_q1_2025 = 48997000.0
pretax_q1_2025 = 308762000.0
tax_q1_2025 = -81233000.0
net_q1_2025 = 227529000.0
# Annual 2024 from the second big table
rev_2024 = 3264554000.0
cogs_2024 = -2072805000.0
gross_2024 = 1191749000.0
ebit_2024 = 948220000.0
fin_2024 = -584815000.0
pretax_2024 = 363405000.0
tax_2024 = 74093000.0
net_2024 = 437498000.0
# Depreciation values
dep_q1_2024 = 153862000.0
dep_q1_2025 = 164082000.0
dep_2024 = 694816000.0
# Cash and financial
disponibilidades = caixa_equivalentes + aplicacoes
# Debt
divida_bruta = emprestimos_fin_circ + emprestimos_fin_nc  # no explicit debentures
# Shares
issued = 293452126
treasury = 352936
outstanding = issued - treasury
price = 14.7
market_cap = price * outstanding
# Rolling 12 months computations
rev_12m = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_12m = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_12m = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
gross_12m = gross_2024 + gross_q1_2025 - gross_q1_2024
# Depreciation 12m
dep_12m = dep_2024 + dep_q1_2025 - dep_q1_2024
ebitda_12m = ebit_12m + dep_12m
# Net debt
divida_liquida = divida_bruta - disponibilidades
ev = market_cap + divida_liquida
# Per-share
lpa = net_12m / outstanding
vpa = patrimonio_liq / outstanding
assets_per_share = assets / outstanding
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circ
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / outstanding
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - estoques  # assumption
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / outstanding
# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
pvp = price / vpa
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_12m if ebit_12m!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_12m if rev_12m!=0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / assets
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / ativ_circ_liq if ativ_circ_liq!=0 else None
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_12m if ebitda_12m!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12m if ebit_12m!=0 else None
marg_bruta = gross_12m / rev_12m * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_12m / rev_12m * 100
marg_liq = net_12m / rev_12m * 100
ebit_ativo = ebit_12m / assets * 100
roic = ebit_12m / (assets - fornecedores - caixa_equivalentes) * 100
roe = net_12m / patrimonio_liq * 100
liquidez_corr = (ativo_circulante - estoques) / passivo_circ
divbr_patrim = divida_bruta / patrimonio_liq
giro_ativos = rev_12m / assets
# 3-month metrics
rev_3m = rev_q1_2025
ebit_3m = ebit_q1_2025
net_3m = net_q1_2025
# Prepare outputs
results = {
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': divida_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': divida_liquida,
    'Patrim. LÍq': patrimonio_liq,
    'Receita L. (12m)': rev_12m,
}
# Print summary
pprint({
    'market_cap': market_cap,
    'outstanding': outstanding,
    'rev_12m': rev_12m,
    'ebit_12m': ebit_12m,
    'net_12m': net_12m,
    'ebitda_12m': ebitda_12m,
    'divida_bruta': divida_bruta,
    'divida_liquida': divida_liquida,
    'ev': ev,
    'lpa': lpa,
    'vpa': vpa,
    'pl': pl,
    'pvp': pvp,
    'p_ebit': p_ebit,
    'psr': psr,
    'p_ativos': p_ativos,
    'p_cap_giro': p_cap_giro,
    'p_ativ_circ_liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'ev_ebitda': ev_ebitda,
    'ev_ebit': ev_ebit,
    'marg_bruta_pct': marg_bruta,
    'marg_ebit_pct': marg_ebit,
    'marg_liq_pct': marg_liq,
    'ebit_ativo_pct': ebit_ativo,
    'roic_pct': roic,
    'roe_pct': roe,
    'liquidez_corr': liquidez_corr,
    'divbr_patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'giro_ativos': giro_ativos,
    'rev_3m': rev_3m,
    'ebit_3m': ebit_3m,
    'net_3m': net_3m
})
print('\nDetailed values (for building JSON):')
print('rev_12m', rev_12m)
print('ebit_12m', ebit_12m)
print('net_12m', net_12m)
print('rev_3m', rev_3m)
print('ebit_3m', ebit_3m)
print('net_3m', net_3m)
print('lpa', lpa)
print('vpa', vpa)
print('marg_bruta_pct', round(marg_bruta,2))
print('marg_ebit_pct', round(marg_ebit,2))
print('marg_liq_pct', round(marg_liq,2))
print('ebit_ativo_pct', round(ebit_ativo,2))
print('roic_pct', round(roic,2))
print('roe_pct', round(roe,2))
print('liquidez_corr', round(liquidez_corr,2))

# Print values
output = {
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': divida_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': divida_liquida,
    'Patrim. LÍq': patrimonio_liq,
    'Receita L (12 meses)': rev_12m,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12m,
    'Lucro L (12 meses)': net_12m,
    'Receita L (3 meses)': rev_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro L (3 meses)': net_3m,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': pvp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta (%)': round(marg_bruta,2),
    'Marg. EBIT (%)': round(marg_ebit,2),
    'Marg. L (%)': round(marg_liq,2),
    'EBIT / Ativo (%)': round(ebit_ativo,2),
    'ROIC (%)': round(roic,2),
    'ROE (%)': round(roe,2),
    'Liquidez Corr': round(liquidez_corr,2),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': round(divbr_patrim,2),
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}
import json
print('\nJSON output:')
print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))

# Print market cap & share counts
print('\nmarket_cap:', market_cap)
print('outstanding shares:', outstanding)

# Final print of numeric variables for copy
for k,v in output.items():
    print(f'{k}: {v}')



"} }
